name: RebarItemEnumerator
summary: The RebarItemEnumerator class allows to loop through the catalog rebar items.

methods.name: DeleteRebarItem
methods.summary: Delete the RebarItem from the list

methods.name: GetRebarHeaderItems
methods.summary: Gets the header items from the rebar catalog header.

methods.name: GetSize
methods.summary: Returns the total amout of items.

methods.name: InsertRebarItem
methods.summary: Insert the RebarItem in to the list

methods.name: ModifyRebarItem
methods.summary: Modify the RebarItem in the list

methods.name: MoveNext
methods.summary: Moves to the next item in the enumerator.

methods.name: RebarItemExists
methods.summary: Check RebarItem is available in database file

methods.name: Reset
methods.summary: Resets the enumerator to the beginning.

methods.name: SelectRebarItem(String, String)
methods.summary: Selects a rebar item in the rebar database with the given grade and size.

methods.name: SelectRebarItem(String, Double, Boolean)
methods.summary: Selects a rebar item in the rebar database with the given grade and nominal diameter.

methods.name: SelectRebarItem(String, String, Double)
methods.summary: Selects a rebar item in the rebar database with the given grade, size and bending radius.

methods.name: SelectRebarItem(String, String, String)
methods.summary: Selects a rebar item in the rebar database with the given grade, size and usage.

methods.name: SelectRebarItem(String, Double, Double, Boolean)
methods.summary: Selects a rebar item in the rebar database with the given grade, nominal diameter and bending radius.

methods.name: SelectRebarItem(String, Double, String, Boolean)
methods.summary: Selects a rebar item in the rebar database with the given grade, nominal diameter and bending radius.

methods.name: SelectRebarItem(String, String, String, String)
methods.summary: Selects a rebar item in the rebar database with the given grade, size, usage and code.

properties.name: Current
properties.summary: Returns a rebar item instance of the current element.
